data.title: Paraguay deports three undocumented immigrants after crypto mining theft attempt
data.description:
Paraguayan law enforcement has deported three individuals and arrested another for attempting to steal crypto miners at a facility near the country’s Itaipu hydroelectric dam. According to a May 15 statement from Paraguayan prosecutor Irene Rolón, the men were caught by police soon after breaking into a locked section of Teratech SA’s facility in Coronel Bogado, leading to their arrest. Prosecutors believe the men may have had ties to Teratech as independent contractors, but are still waiting on official confirmation from the company’s CEO. The three deported were Chinese nationals Jinping Duan, Tian Jianyun and Zheng Guanglong, who did not have official entry records into the country
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/paraguay-deports-three-illegal-immigrants-after-crypto-mining-theft-attempt?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin futures market shows signs of maturity amid price surge, Glassnode reports
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Fresh data from analytics firm Glassnode reveals a remarkably balanced trading landscape, despite Bitcoin’s robust price surge. The perpetual futures market has maintained its composure, with funding rates hovering at a measured 0. 007% – yielding an annualised figure of 7. 6%
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bitcoin-futures-market-shows-signs-of-maturity-amid-price-surge-glassnode-reports/

data.title: 25x short ETH address has made a profit of $2.4 million after being dormant for 4 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, as the market led to a general decline in altcoins, the address that previously spent $2.95 million to open a 25x ETH short order on HyperLiquid, as well as 10x leveraged PEPE, WIF and OP short orders, has made a floating profit of $2.4 million in less than 4 hours. It is worth noting that before this high-multiple short operation, the address had been silent for 4 years.

data.title: Ethereum exchange reserves drop by 300,000 ETH as bullish momentum builds toward $2,665 resistance
data.description:
17-5-2025 – Ethereum (ETH) has witnessed a significant shift in market dynamics, with its reserves on Binance dwindling from 4. 1 million ETH to 3. 9 million ETH since mid-April 2025—a reduction of 300,000 ETH. This decline reflects a growing trend among investors to prioritise long-term holding and decentralised protocols, easing the sell-side pressure typically exerted by [
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-exchange-reserves-drop-by-300000-eth-as-bullish-momentum-builds-toward-2665-resistance/

data.title: Bitcoin Futures Funding Rates Remain Neutral Amid Price Surge
data.description: According to Foresight News, Glassnode has reported that despite a significant increase in Bitcoin's price, the funding rates for perpetual futures have remained at a neutral level of approximately 0.007%, which translates to an annualized rate of 7.6%. This indicates that long positions are still relatively moderate. The derivatives market appears to be catching up with the spot market, and the limited leverage suggests that this trend is healthy and sustainable.

data.title: Gate Alpha has been launched on KEKIUS, KORI, buidl, APU, FARTSIGHT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate Alpha has now listed Kekius Maximus (KEKIUS), Kori The Pom (KORI), buidl (buidl), Apu Apustaja (APU) and FARTSIGHT (FARTSIGHT), and you can trade them by entering the APP.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in their spot accounts to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: Galaxy Digital officially listed on Nasdaq with stock code GLXY
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Galaxy Digital was officially listed on the Nasdaq this Friday with the stock code GLXY. After the opening of the first trading day, the stock price rose by 14% at one point, and then fell back to the opening price to erase the previous gains. The closing price was US$22.66.

data.title: The whale shorted HYPE 5 times and suffered a floating loss of 12.06 million US dollars. It withdrew 3 million USDC from Binance as margin again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by Ember, a whale who shorted 1.875 million HYPE 5 times has suffered a floating loss of 12.06 million US dollars and withdrew another 3 million USDC from Binance as margin.

data.title: Bitcoin bull flag and standard profit taking hint at eventual rally to new BTC price highs
data.description:
Key takeaways: Traders expect a Bitcoin price pullback to $90,000, but a bull flag could break out to new highs if profit taking near the range highs reduces. On-chain data suggests the current profit taking is too weak to extinguish Bitcoin’s current price momentum. Bitcoin (BTC) price has spent the bulk of the week pinned below $104,000 to $105,000, which many analysts have labelled as a resistance zone, but an alternative view suggests that BTC is simply consolidating within a bull flag. A bull flag is a continuation pattern that is characterized by a period of sideways price action following a sharp uptrend, and when the structure confirms or breaks from the trendline resistance, the uptrend continues
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bull-flag-and-standard-profit-taking-hint-at-eventual-rally-to-new-btc-price-highs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
